name: Islamic College of Minnesota
description: An academic mobile portal for students of the Islamic College of Minnesota, providing seamless access to courses, lectures, assignments, and campus news.
features: Access and download course materials and assignments.
Watch recorded academic lectures directly within the app.
Real-time push notifications for university announcements.
Student dashboard for tracking progress and grades.
my_role: Mobile Developer - Developed a robust educational platform focusing on secure media playback and offline caching, allowing students to download large PDF materials and study smoothly on the go.
